results.title: Senior Data Scientist
results.description: We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to join our growing analytics team. You will work with Python, SQL, and machine learning frameworks including scikit-learn and PyTorch. Experience with AWS, Docker, and MLOps practices is essential. You will build and deploy predictive models, run A/B testing experiments, and present findings to senior stakeholders. Strong statistics and hypothesis testing skills required.

results.title: Data Engineer
results.description: Join our data platform team as a Data Engineer. You will design and maintain scalable data pipelines using Apache Spark, Apache Kafka, and Apache Airflow. Strong SQL and Python skills are required. Experience with dbt, Snowflake or Google BigQuery, and Docker is highly desirable. You will work in an Agile team and follow CI/CD best practices. Knowledge of data modelling and data warehousing is essential.

results.title: Machine Learning Engineer
results.description: We need a Machine Learning Engineer with strong Python and TensorFlow or PyTorch skills. You will work on deep learning models for computer vision and natural language processing. Experience with MLOps, model deployment, Docker, Kubernetes, and REST API development using FastAPI is required. AWS or Google Cloud Platform experience is a plus. Familiarity with feature engineering and XGBoost is beneficial.

results.title: Data Analyst
results.description: Seeking a Data Analyst to help drive business decisions using data. You will use Python, SQL, and Power BI or Tableau to analyse large datasets and produce dashboards. Strong Microsoft Excel and statistics skills needed. You will communicate insights to non-technical stakeholders and run ad-hoc analyses. Experience with pandas, numpy, and regression analysis is required. Familiarity with A/B testing and experimental design is a bonus.

results.title: Principal Data Scientist
results.description: Lead data science initiatives at scale. Deep expertise in machine learning, statistics, and Python required. You will architect end-to-end solutions using AWS, Apache Spark, and our internal data platform. Experience with large language models, LangChain, and vector databases is highly valued. Strong stakeholder management and communication skills are essential. Experience with time series analysis, forecasting, and Langfuse or similar observability tools is a plus.

results.title: Junior Data Scientist
results.description: Great opportunity for an early-career data scientist. You will use Python, R, and SQL to build classification and clustering models. We use scikit-learn and XGBoost for model development. Strong statistics and data analysis skills are expected. You will present findings using Tableau or Power BI. Experience with git and agile methodology is required. Knowledge of pandas, numpy, and data visualisation is essential.

results.title: Analytics Engineer
results.description: We are hiring an Analytics Engineer to own our data transformation layer. Strong SQL and Python skills are mandatory. You will build and maintain dbt models on top of Google BigQuery or Snowflake. Experience with data modelling, business intelligence, and Looker is required. Knowledge of Apache Airflow for orchestration and git version control is essential. Familiarity with data warehousing concepts and CI/CD pipelines is expected.

results.title: NLP Data Scientist
results.description: Specialist NLP role in our conversational AI team. You will develop and deploy natural language processing models using Python and PyTorch or TensorFlow. Experience with large language models, prompt engineering, and vector databases is essential. Docker and Kubernetes for containerised deployment, REST API design, and AWS or Microsoft Azure cloud experience required. Strong problem solving skills and the ability to communicate technical results clearly are key.
